description_long: This is a single high-top sneaker featuring a combination of dark blue and tan panels, with visible signs of wear and dirt on the exterior. The shoe has a lace-up front with black laces and metallic eyelets, as well as a zipper running along the side for additional fastening. The sole is white with a textured grip, showing discoloration and dirt from use. The interior is exposed, revealing a partially torn insole and a hollow cavity, indicating significant wear and possible damage. The upper material appears to be a mix of synthetic leather and fabric, with reinforced stitching along the seams. The overall appearance suggests this shoe has been used extensively in urban environments.
description: A worn high-top sneaker with dark blue and tan panels, black laces, a side zipper, and a dirty white sole. The shoe shows significant wear, with a partially exposed interior and visible scuff marks.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the hollow, damaged interior, black laces, and the tan collar with zipper partially open.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dark blue and tan panels, the zipper, and the dirty white sole with visible wear.
description_view_2: Bottom-up angled view revealing the torn insole, hollow interior, and the front toe area with scuff marks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the heel, more of the tan collar, and the overall worn condition of the upper material.
